member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Integration.Tests.IntegrationTests
member.summary: Full-pipeline integration tests. Each test runs against a real so the complete ASP.NET Core middleware stack is exercised (routing, rate limiting, etc.).

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Integration.Tests.IntegrationTests.CreateDPopProof(System.Security.Cryptography.ECDsa,System.Net.Http.HttpMethod,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a valid DPoP proof JWT signed with the provided key.
